item.title: Alto Neuroscience (Schizophrenia Program)
item.description:
• Summary: Alto Neuroscience halts work on a PDE4 inhibitor after it fails to meet endpoints in a Phase 2 schizophrenia study targeting cognitive impairment. The shelving of this program underscores the difficulties in developing treatments for cognitive deficits in psychiatric disorders, affecting Alto's neuroscience pipeline.
  • MoAs: PDE4 inhibitor: Inhibits phosphodiesterase 4, increasing cyclic AMP (cAMP) levels to potentially improve cognitive function
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech, Endpoints News

item.title: Korsana (Alzheimer's Reverse Merger)
item.description:
• Summary: Korsana, an offshoot of Paragon Biosciences, is going public via a reverse merger to fund its Alzheimer's disease work. The company is focused on developing novel assets for neurodegenerative conditions.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News, Fierce Biotech
